title: Old man yells at Cloud
summary: I'm not exactly old, but at some point in history 37 was considered old. I think. I've been doing this whole startup/engineering thing for some time. Sometimes I have a lot of patience for it, sometimes I don't. I generally prefer to focus on culture and inter personal challenges
content: I'm not exactly old, but at some point in history 37 was considered old. I think. I've been doing this whole startup/engineering thing for some time. Sometimes I have a lot of patience for it, sometimes I don't. I generally prefer to focus on culture and inter personal challenges
